name: logika
description: Classical formal logic from G. Chelpanov's textbook: concepts, judgments, syllogisms, induction, fallacies, laws of thought. Two text modes — logical review (logika:review, analysis-only report) and argument fixing (rewrite with corrected logic) — plus solving logic textbook problems. Russian-language references distilled from the source book.

interface.shortDescription: Classical formal logic — review & fix arguments, syllogisms, fallacies (RU).
